{{Quote|Where's Juno with that heavy cruiser?|[[Nym/Legends|Nym]]|<ref name="JSF" />}}
The '''Mere Cruiser''' was a heavy [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] created by the [[Mere]] of [[Maramere]] some time prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
These small vessels, approximately 195 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length, featured twin [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drive]] engines and powerful, forward-mounted [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons and 12 light turbolasers (2 in the back, 4 at the base, 2 near the front, and 4 on the ventral hull).<ref name="JSF" />

==History==
Several Mere cruisers were used by the [[Mere Resistance]] forces led by [[Sol Sixxa]]. Two Mere cruisers, the ''[[Kethor]]'' commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Orsai]] and the ''[[Tritus]]'', accompanied the pirate chief [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] during his siege on [[Nod Kartha]]. Orsai sacrificed himself in the battle when he sent the damaged ''Kethor'' into a collision with the orbital shield generator, allowing Nym's forces to break past the defense screen.<ref name="JSF" />

During the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], Nym engaged [[Cavik Toth]] and his [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]] above [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. He was aided by the appearance of three Mere cruisers, commanded by captains [[Juno (captain)|Juno]], [[Antilles (Mere)|Antilles]] and [[Cori]], which turned their powerful cannons on Toth's [[Sabaoth destroyer|Sabaoth Destroyers]].<ref name="JSF" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
